description: BigQuery view dependency manifest for test execution

views.name: v_openaq_deduped
views.description: Deduped OpenAQ hourly data with latest ingested_at per dedup_key

views.name: v_weather_deduped
views.description: Deduped weather forecast data with latest ingested_at per station_valid_time

views.name: v_station_latest_pollutants
views.description: Latest pollutant readings per station with pivot to columns

views.name: v_station_hourly_wide
views.description: Hourly air quality data pivoted wide per station-hour

views.name: v_station_hourly_combined
views.description: Hourly pollutants LEFT JOINed with weather at matching station/hour

views.name: v_station_dispersion_outlook
views.description: Future forecast hours with computed dispersion index

views.name: v_station_current_outlook
views.description: Current conditions and next 3h outlook per station

views.name: v_station_freshness
views.description: Data freshness metrics and staleness flags per station
